hero_section.title: Pig Production Data Management and Analytics Simplified
hero_section.desc: Streamline your pig farm operations with comprehensive data management

dashboard_overview.title: Dashboard Overview
dashboard_overview.desc: Real-time pig farm metrics and numbers at your fingertips

sow_management.title: Sow Management
sow_management.desc: Manage your breeding sows, boars and gilts

breeding_cycles.title: Breeding Cycles Management
breeding_cycles.desc: Track gestation, lactation, and breeding cycles

pig_operations.title: Pig Operations Management
pig_operations.desc: Automated reminders for vaccinations, farrowing, weaning, and other important pig operations

traceability.title: Traceability of Pig Operations
traceability.desc: Clear tracking who did the pig operation and when and what dosages given to pigs

fattening.title: Track and estimate Fatteners feed requirements
fattening.desc: Record every vaccine, medicine, health issue, history for each production cycle

feed_records.title: Record feeds consumption  per production batch
feed_records.desc: Feed Balance and audit can be recorded anytime.

farm_reports.title: Generate Status Report for your Farm
farm_reports.desc: Comprehensive reporting to know the status of your pig farm.

all_data_one_place.title: All Your Pig Production Data in One Place
all_data_one_place.desc: Centralized platform for all your farm data - from breeding to harvest, accessible anytime, anywhere.

complete_data_management.title: Complete Data Management
complete_data_management.desc: From pig breeding stocks, gestation, lactation, fattening, harvest, feeds, financials and more - all seamlessly integrated.

data_collaboration.title: Team-Based Data Management
data_collaboration.desc: Seamless data cooperation between farm management and staff. Farm Staff, managers and owners can input and track pig farm data in real-time.

pig_operations.title: No More Missed Vaccinations & Operations
pig_operations.desc: Automated reminders for vaccinations, farrowing, weaning, and other important pig operations.

data_analytics.title: Simplified Data Analytics
data_analytics.desc: Smart algorithms estimate your feed needs at any given time, predict harvest dates, and optimize your production cycle.

financial_insights.title: Financial Insights
financial_insights.desc: Track costs, revenues, and profitability per batch, per farm, or across your entire operation.

call_to_action.title: Ready to Transform Your Pig Production?
call_to_action.desc: Join hundreds of successful farms using SuperPig

page_signup.farm_owner_desc: Farm Owner or Manager — You own or manage a pig farm and need full access to manage operations, staff, and financial data.
page_signup.farm_staff_desc: Farm Staff — You work on a pig farm and need to join an existing farm account. Ask the account admin for the access code.
page_signup.terms_text: By signing up, I accept the J SysDev Terms of Service and acknowledge the Privacy Policy.
page_signup.valid_email: Please enter a valid email address
